scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build --outDir dist/client && vite build --ssr worker/index.ts --outDir dist/server --emptyOutDir false && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.mkdirSync('dist/.openai', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('.openai/hosting.json', 'dist/.openai/hosting.json')"
